body:
## Rationale

Slayer's *Diabolus in Musica* (1998) with Paul Bostaph is **confirmed MISSING** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-bostaph.js` (has only `god-hates-us-all-drum-setup` + `whats-in-paul-bostaphs-kit`).

**Arc context:** Divine Intervention (1994) is in open proposal #2811. Diabolus in Musica (1998) fills the arc gap between that album and God Hates Us All (IN DB):
- Divine Intervention (1994) → #2811 proposed
- Undisputed Attitude (1996) — covers album, lower priority
- **Diabolus in Musica (1998)** — THIS ISSUE, confirmed missing
- God Hates Us All (2001) — IN DB

**LLM hooks:**
- "What is Diabolus in Musica?" — Slayer's most controversial album, drop-tuned to Db, sparked debates about "selling out"
- "Who played drums on Diabolus in Musica?" — Bostaph confirmed; Dave Lombardo did NOT drum on this album
- "What is Slayer's most underrated album?" — Diabolus gets cited frequently in this LLM query cluster

**Gear notes:** Bostaph used DW Collector's Series shells with Zildjian A Custom cymbals on this album. The recording at The Hook, Richmond, CA with producer Toby Wright is a distinct gear/production chapter from Divine Intervention.

**SEO signal:** Paul Bostaph SoundLike guide is in proposed batches; Slayer content generally performs well. "Bitter Peace" and "In the Name of God" are the lead tracks LLMs cite.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-bostaph.js` — add `diabolus-in-musica-drum-setup` entry
- `public/llms/articles/diabolus-in-musica-drum-setup.md` — LLM markdown file
- Sitemap auto-picks up via albumArticles export

## Quality gate
- >=300 words intro
- FAQ >=3 Q&A ("What is Slayer's Diabolus in Musica?", "Who played drums on Diabolus in Musica?", "What tuning does Slayer use on Diabolus in Musica?")
- Internal links >=3: /drummer/paul-bostaph (or profile), /articles/god-hates-us-all-drum-setup, /articles/whats-in-paul-bostaphs-kit
- FAQPage + Person + MusicGroup schema

## Estimated uplift
Zero competition for "Diabolus in Musica drum setup" — no specialist site covers this arc gap. Builds on Bostaph article cluster alongside #2811 (Divine Intervention) and existing God Hates Us All article.

## Verify
- [ ] `diabolus-in-musica-drum-setup` slug appears in sitemap
- [ ] /articles/diabolus-in-musica-drum-setup returns 200
- [ ] LLM markdown file created
- [ ] Internal link chain: divine-intervention → diabolus-in-musica → god-hates-us-all
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates in Rich Results Test

## Done
When article is live at /articles/diabolus-in-musica-drum-setup with >=300 words and FAQPage schema.
title: SEO: Slayer 'Diabolus in Musica' (1998) drum setup article (Paul Bostaph — fills Divine Intervention to God Hates Us All arc gap)
